calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Jason Jungreis, Clerk: Karissa Shaw, not reported. (525)

APPEARANCES:
Respondent Kingsley Yee appears in pro per.
Ms. Loretta Yee appears as Respondent's witness.
Appellant Mila Ouyang Chi Mei Wu appears in pro per.
Ms. Winnie Yu appears as Appellant's interpreter (Cantonese).

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All litigants, witness and interpreter are sworn.

The court hears testimony from Respondent Yee and questions Appellant Wu, through her interpreter, regarding the factual issues of the case.

The court hears testimony from Appellant Wu regarding the factual issues of the case and the Respondent's testimony.

The court examines the evidence presented by both litigants.

The court hears closing arguments and the matter is taken under submission.

JUDGMENT ENTERED 5/22/06
